news.title:
HDFC Securities highlights India's EMS sector growth, driven by PLI, China+1 strategy, and rising exports. Syrma SGS is its top pick with a target price of ₹920.
Dixon Tech gets 'Add' rating (₹10,740 target), Amber Enterprises 'Buy' (₹8,300 target), and Kaynes Technology 'Reduce' (₹3,810 target).
news.summary:
HDFC Securities highlights India's EMS sector growth, driven by PLI, China+1 strategy, and rising exports. Syrma SGS is its top pick with a target price of ₹920.
Dixon Tech gets 'Add' rating (₹10,740 target), Amber Enterprises 'Buy' (₹8,300 target), and Kaynes Technology 'Reduce' (₹3,810 target).

news.title:
EMS sector grows via PLI incentives, supply chain diversification.
Stocks in focus: Syrma, Dixon, Kaynes, Amber as per HDFC Securities.
news.summary:

news.title:
Vaishali Parekh recommends UCO Bank, Kaynes Technology, and Asian Paints for intraday trading on 7 Apr 2026.

OSAT facility ramps up shipments, boosting Kaynes Technology's growth initiatives.

Kaynes Tech plans extensive expansion in semiconductor advanced packaging by 2028.
India's semiconductor push aligns with Kaynes Tech's growth initiatives.

news.title:
Motilal Oswal projects a 36% rally in Kaynes Tech, citing expansion into semiconductors and diversified growth sectors.
Kaynes' OSAT facility, partnerships, and CAGR targets strengthen its position; risks remain in execution and macroeconomics.

news.title:
Kaynes Technology's subsidiary inaugurated a new plant at Sanand GIDC, Ahmedabad.
The facility, belonging to Kaynes Semicon, was inaugurated by PM Narendra Modi.
news.summary:
Kaynes Technology's subsidiary inaugurated a new plant at Sanand GIDC, Ahmedabad.
The facility, belonging to Kaynes Semicon, was inaugurated by PM Narendra Modi.

news.title:
PM Modi inaugurated Kaynes Semicon's Rs 3,300 crore semiconductor OSAT facility in Sanand, Gujarat, under the India Semiconductor Mission.
The plant will produce 6.33M units/day, reducing import dependence and boosting India's semiconductor self-reliance.
news.summary:
PM Modi inaugurated Kaynes Semicon's Rs 3,300 crore semiconductor OSAT facility in Sanand, Gujarat, under the India Semiconductor Mission.
The plant will produce 6.33M units/day, reducing import dependence and boosting India's semiconductor self-reliance.

news.title:
Kaynes Technology reported a SEBI settlement order related to insider trading violations by ex-MD Ramesh Kunhikannan.
A penalty of Rs. 23.4 lakh was paid by the ex-MD personally, with no financial impact on the company.
news.summary:
Kaynes Technology reported a SEBI settlement order related to insider trading violations by ex-MD Ramesh Kunhikannan.
A penalty of Rs. 23.4 lakh was paid by the ex-MD personally, with no financial impact on the company.

news.title: SEBI issued a settlement order against Kaynes Technology India in an insider trading case.
news.summary: SEBI issued a settlement order against Kaynes Technology India in an insider trading case.

news.title:
Kaynes Tech expects a Rs 500 Cr boost from India's $11B chip fund, aiding domestic semiconductor growth.
The firm's OSAT facility in Gujarat is operational, with 3 clients, despite FY26 guidance cut to Rs 4,100 Cr.
news.summary:
Kaynes Tech expects a Rs 500 Cr boost from India's $11B chip fund, aiding domestic semiconductor growth.

news.title:
Govt plans to recalibrate PLI 2.0 for IT hardware, focusing on AI servers and advanced components.
EMS players Syrma, Dixon, and Kaynes may benefit if policy aligns with industry expectations.
news.summary:

news.title:
Kaynes Technology India's credit rating reaffirmed by CRISIL as 'A Stable', removing 'Rating Watch with Developing Implications'.
Total bank loan facilities rated at Rs.770 crore across multiple banks including Canara, HDFC, ICICI, and SBI.
